title: Monkey found in a package
transcript:
If there is a travel class worse than economy, this poor monkey got to experience it.
Authorities in Turkey say they found a baby rhesus
during a routine screening at a bus terminal.
They say the parcel was abandoned,
so agents put it through an X-ray scan.
Motion was detected, so they decided to open up the package.
They found this little guy had been confined to a wooden crate with air holes cut out.
Knowing that's no way to transport an animal, it was confiscated by wildlife officials and taken to an animal park.
It was given a full checkup to make sure it wasn't hurt in any way.
The monkey was then given much nicer accommodations.
Reports say a man did show up to claim the package,
but instead, he was reported to authorities for possession of a prohibited animal species.
